claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: 01 = IPPS — Acute Inpatient Prospective Payment system (PPS) 
02 = LTCHPPS — Long-term Care Hospital (LTCH) PPS 
03 = SNFPPS — skilled nursing facility (SNF) PPS 
04 = HHPPS — Home Health (HH) PPS 
05 = IRFPPS — Inpatient Rehabilitation Facility (IRF) PPS 
06 = IPFPPS — Inpatient Psychiatric Facility (IPF) PPS 
07 = OPPS — Outpatient PPS 
08 = Fee Schedules (for physicians, DME, ambulance, and clinical lab) 
09 = Part C Hierarchical
